display.purpose: Stat counters and primary page headings.

headline.purpose: Card headers and structural layout labels.

body.purpose: Standard content descriptions and form inputs.

label.purpose: Muted metadata, secondary details, and helper text.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Subtle depth cue for clickable elements.

shadows.name: focus-overlay
shadows.purpose: Accessibility outline highlight for active navigation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button for primary interactive highlights.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7c5cfc; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5e4cff; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary outline button for neutral actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #101828; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #e7eaf3; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f9fafb; }

components.name: Slate Button
components.description: Bold dark button for landing page primary triggers.
components.css: .ds-btn-slate { background: #272835; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-slate:hover { background: #131316; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Standard container card for housing dashboard panels and modules.
components.html:
Card Title

This is standard card content.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7eaf3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0px 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card-header { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #101828; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #6a7282; }

narrative.overview: JobPilot's interface is designed to evoke absolute confidence, intelligence, and seamless productivity. Operating as an automated tech assistant, the visual layout guides the job seeker through complex data (match scores, company research, resume elements) with clear layouts and visual signals.
keyCharacteristics: High density of structured information presented through crisp layouts.
Tinted neutral backgrounds contrasted with vibrant purple accents.
Responsive, clean interfaces built using predefined variables only.

rules.name: The Rarity of Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Text Bound Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs must not stretch beyond 75ch in line length to ensure high readability.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Subtle shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, active).

dos: Do use Off-White Canvas (#f6f7fb) for all page layouts to create visual separation from clean white cards.
Do implement a crisp focus ring on every interactive form input.
Do restrict card container backgrounds to Pure Snow (#ffffff).
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, alerts, or lists.
Don't use text gradient backgrounds or text clipping. Keep text solid Slate (#101828).
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blurs unless specifically styled for modals/popups.
